message: User: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/ops is not authorized to perform: cloudtrail:LookupEvents on resource: arn:aws:cloudtrail:ap-southeast-1:123456789012:trail/* because no identity-based policy allows the cloudtrail:LookupEvents action
_note: This is a fixture convention to represent an AWS SDK error. Real boto3 would raise botocore.exceptions.ClientError; AWS CLI would print AccessDenied to stderr.
